subcodes.first_line: O bird of inner meanings and utterance! Soar thou in the atmosphere of divine knowledge, then hearken unto the melodies of thy Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا طیر المعانی و البیان طیر فی هواء العرفان ثم اسمع نغمات ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
